_description: Mixed-violation SCORM 1.2 package exercising the orchestrator's full dispatch path. Contains violations for: decorative images (fixable), heading order (one fixable + one declined), video captions (one wireable + one deferred), and an unclaimed criterion.

targetSize._rationale: Option B from the chunk-09 spec. The raise-target-size fixer (chunk 03) requires a boundingBox field on each violation. The static 2.5.8 check (src/checks/2-5-8-target-size-minimum.js) does NOT emit boundingBox — it only emits file, line, snippet, severity, criterion. Because the static check is the only check that would fire on this fixture's HTML content, raise-target-size.canFix() will always return false (no boundingBox), meaning the fixer is staged but effectively dormant for statically-detected findings. v4 ships the fixer ready for v4.1 when the dynamic 2.5.8 check is updated to emit boundingBox. No 2.5.8 violations are seeded in this fixture.
targetSize.notes: 2.5.8 violations are NOT present in this fixture. The raise-target-size fixer is registered in the safe tier but will not fire against static-only findings that lack boundingBox. Re-enable dynamic-check-based assertions once the 2.5.8 dynamic check emits boundingBox.

headings.fixableCase: page-headings.html — page starts with <h2>, no <h1>. normalize-heading-order detects missing-h1 pattern and promotes the first <h2> to <h1>.
headings.declinedCase: page-headings-declined.html — page has two <h3> elements and no h1/h2. normalize-heading-order declines because multiple headings share the first level (peers != 1 check).

captions.wireable: page-video-with-vtt.html — <video src='intro.mp4'> with intro.vtt present in the package. wire-captions-track injects <track kind='captions' src='intro.vtt' ...>.
captions.deferred: page-video-no-vtt.html — <video src='lecture.mp4'> with no lecture.vtt present. wire-captions-track defers because no matching .vtt is found.

unclaimed.notes: 1.4.4 (Resize Text) has no v4 fixer. Any 1.4.4 violation from page-unclaimed.html will land in manifest.deferred with reason matching /no fixer registered/.
